allow: Bash(python3 -c " from html.parser import HTMLParser import re class TextExtractor\(HTMLParser\): def __init__\(self\): super\(\).__init__\(\) self.texts = [] self.skip = False def handle_starttag\(self, tag, attrs\): if tag in \('script', 'style'\): self.skip = True def handle_endtag\(self, tag\): if tag in \('script', 'style'\): self.skip = False def handle_data\(self, data\): if not self.skip: t = data.strip\(\) if t and len\(t\) > 2: self.texts.append\(t\) with open\('/c/Users/Caleb/Downloads/FRC 2025 _ ldythomaslin.html', 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'\) as f: html = f.read\(\) parser = TextExtractor\(\) parser.feed\(html\) for t in parser.texts: print\(t\) ")
